name: Ubiquiti airMAX Lite AP
title: Ubiquiti airMAX Lite AP
short_description: Frequency 5 GHz, Throughput 450+ Mbps, High-performance 120 degree antenna
description: Frequency 5 GHz, Throughput 450+ Mbps, High-performance 120 degree antenna

detailed_description.heading: Standalone and Integrated Use
detailed_description.text: As a standalone unit, the LAP-120 can serve as an access point, providing wireless connectivity to a wide area thanks to its 120-degree coverage. It's ideal for offering Wi-Fi in outdoor spaces or large indoor areas where a strong, reliable signal is required. This makes it suitable for small businesses, cafes, or outdoor venues that need to provide internet access to customers or staff over a broad area. However, the LAP-120 shines brightest when used in conjunction with other Ubiquiti airMAX devices. Its compatibility with the airMAX ac technology allows it to seamlessly integrate into a network comprising other Ubiquiti devices, enabling a more extensive, robust, and high-performing network infrastructure. This integration can facilitate more complex deployments, such as multi-point configurations, extended range connections, or networks requiring higher data throughput and capacity. Moreover, the device's integration capabilities are not limited to Ubiquiti's own products. Thanks to its adherence to standard wireless protocols and frequencies, the LAP-120 can also work with compatible equipment from other manufacturers. This interoperability is crucial for network administrators looking to expand existing networks or build new ones without being locked into a single vendor's ecosystem.

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Hardware
detailed_description.text: Designed with precision, the LAP-120 is part of the airMAX line of products, which are specifically engineered to deliver superior performance in wireless internet service provider (WISP) networks, among other applications. The device operates within the 5 GHz frequency band, optimizing the balance between long-range connectivity and high-throughput performance. This selection of frequency ensures that the LAP-120 can offer substantial bandwidth to support the increasing demand for data-intensive services, while also minimizing interference from other devices operating in more congested bands. One of the standout features of the LAP-120 is its integrated antenna technology, which utilizes Ubiquiti's proprietary airMAX ac technology. This technology enables the LAP-120 to achieve significant gains in performance and range, making it an ideal solution for wide area network deployments. The antenna is designed with a 120-degree beamwidth, providing extensive coverage that is perfect for reaching multiple clients over a broad area, while maintaining a high-quality connection.

detailed_description.heading: Software and Durability
detailed_description.text: The LAP-120 also benefits from Ubiquiti's airOS software, which provides a user-friendly interface for device setup and management. This software includes advanced features such as airMAX ac protocol support, real-time analytics, and device configuration adjustments. These tools are invaluable for network administrators who need to optimize their network's performance, monitor traffic, and manage devices efficiently. Durability is a key aspect of the design of the LAP-120, with its robust construction ensuring that it can withstand the rigors of outdoor deployment. The device is built to endure various environmental conditions, from extreme temperatures to precipitation (-40 °C to 70 °C), ensuring reliable operation and longevity. This durability, combined with the device's compact and unobtrusive design, makes it an excellent choice for discreet installation in a variety of settings.
